title: [epic] Extract Renode Meshtastic board definitions as standalone project
description:
Phase 2: Add Meshtastic board definitions to renode-lora-peripherals monorepo.

SCOPE:
1. Add boards/ directory with T-Echo, RAK4631, T-Deck, Heltec
2. Add stubs/ with GPS.cs and BLE.cs
3. Each board .repl wires SX126x from phase 1
4. Fix RAK4631 GPIO wiring (r7h4.9 must be done first)
5. Example: boot Meshtastic firmware to shell prompt
6. CI: each board boots Zephyr hello_world

DEPENDS ON: ddcu (SX126x peripheral must exist first)

DELIVERABLE: Meshtastic devs can test firmware in Renode

ACCEPTANCE: Meshtastic firmware boots to shell on T-Echo in Renode
